feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - printing
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.

entry.title: woodblock
entry.summary: A technique originally developed in China as a way of printing on textiles and later on paper, the oldest surviving fragments to survive date back to the Han dynasty (before 220).
